items.title: Air strike hit Kabul rehab centre as patients ate dinner, survivor tells BBC
items.dek: The exact number killed in Monday night's strike by Pakistan is still not known, but is feared to be in the hundreds.
items.body: The exact number killed in Monday night's strike by Pakistan is still not known, but is feared to be in the hundreds.

items.title: Barnwell: The Broncos are all-in, and the Dolphins are all-out ... but does either strategy make sense?
items.dek: Denver traded its first-round pick to Miami for Jaylen Waddle. Are the Broncos legit Super Bowl contenders? Are the Dolphins rebuilding in a smart way?
items.body: Denver traded its first-round pick to Miami for Jaylen Waddle. Are the Broncos legit Super Bowl contenders? Are the Dolphins rebuilding in a smart way?
